name: Sousou no Frieren "RPG"
description:
It says "rpg", but i made it much more for the slice-of-life style that i was aiming for myself. If you want a little more battle and powers focused i highly recommend the Frieren Rpg bot that was made by @Edwin0735

I didn't read the manga, and i didn't intended to the bot to be a 1:1 recreation of the world of the anime, but it turned out pretty faithful to the original material (at least when it comes to the three main characters).

Most of the 'prompt' i just copy pasted from Gemini results or the Frieren Wiki. But parts of the prompt (and the initial message, because I'm that lazy) are STOLEN from other bot creators.

@Edwin0735

@CF11

@Bait003

I just wanted to share what was supposed to be only a private bot for myself. You can copy the entire prompt, paste it and publish with another scenario or added or removed characters, but make sure to cite these creators above.

Suggestions are welcomed. (sorry for the bad english)

I don't even know if the bot will work properly...
creator: Hudso14
